prompt: A photorealistic selfie on the surface of Mars, framed at arm’s length in a casual slightly wide-angle smartphone perspective. In the foreground are 2 subjects standing close together from chest-up: a human man on the left wearing a black crewneck shirt with a clear white OpenAI logo on the chest, and a tall elegant female alien on the right with shimmering blue-green metallic skin, elongated ears, subtle facial ridges, and a sleek biomechanical-looking outfit with bronze and silver tones, a deep neckline, fine ornamental seams, and layered necklaces with a prominent blue gemstone pendant. The man has short dark messy hair and his left arm extends toward the camera as if taking the selfie. The alien leans in close beside him, both posed like a friendly commemorative snapshot. The background is a red rocky Martian desert with scattered stones, low hills, and a dusty orange sunset sky. On the far left stands a roadside-style sign with 2 lines of text reading MARS and WELCOME HOME. On the far right in the distance is 1 large retro-futuristic white rocket standing upright on landing legs, with visible vertical text reading SPACEX. Warm orange lighting, cinematic realism, detailed textures, subtle atmospheric haze, social-media-announcement vibe, high detail, natural depth of field.
